gtceu.multiblock.biological_simulation_l: Laser hatch are allowed to be used, but only those of UXV or above can be used
The harmonizing core can be placed in the Machine Gui
The maximum number of parallel connections for each voltage level that is one step higher than UEV is multiply n
When not placed in the harmonizing core, n = 8; after being placed, n = 12
After placing the harmonizing core, the ME Pattern Buffer can be used at the output position
gtceu.multiblock.fuxi_bagua_heaven_forgi: §7易有太极,是生两仪,两仪生四象,四象生八卦
gtceu.multiblock.time_space_distorter.to: §7指针拨动,概率的薄纱被轻易刺穿,零与百分之百的疆界在它手中熔为液态
§7它以电流为引线,以未名之液为薪柴,将缄默的配方唤醒,赋予其倍数增殖的梦呓
§7最终,它甚至攫取量子的涟漪与超维的碎影,在交织的因果线上,编织出超越逻辑本身的丰饶
§7它并非在制造,它是在对“存在”本身进行优雅的赦免与重构
